claims.headline: Boosts brain growth signals
claims.notesSentence: Elevates brain-derived neurotrophic factor (BDNF) and TrkB activity in the rat basal forebrain.

claims.headline: Supports brain recovery
claims.notesSentence: Improved neurological outcomes versus placebo in patients with acute ischemic stroke in a clinical trial.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Semax stroke recovery clinical trial on PubMed

claims.headline: Sharper focus & memory
claims.notesSentence: Studied as a nootropic peptide that modulates attention and working memory under cognitively demanding tasks.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Semax cognitive performance study on PubMed

claims.headline: Protects brain cells
claims.notesSentence: Modulates neurotrophic and anti-apoptotic gene expression implicated in neuronal survival.

claims.headline: Calms the stress response
claims.notesSentence: A non-hormonal ACTH 4-10 derivative with documented anxiolytic and stress-buffering effects in animal models.
